entries.source: Children below the age of 13 are encouraged to use the app, but under adult supervision. However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. If you are a parent of a child under 13 years of age and you believe your child has provided us with Personal Information, we will take necessary actions and notify you if necessary. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.
entries.value: Children below age ee 13 waa encouraged si isticmaal app, laakiin under adult supervision. However, annaga do ma knowingly collect ama process kasta shakhsi ah macluumaad ka yimid children under age ee 13 iyo hereby specifically prohibit kasta user under age ee 13 ka yimid providing us leh kasta shakhsi ah macluumaad la'aan parental consent. haddii aad waa waalid ee child under 13 years ee age iyo aad believe kaaga child leh provided us leh shakhsi ah macluumaad, annaga wuu take necessary actions iyo notify aad haddii necessary. There waa no fixed timeline loogu talagalay necessary action as taas depends ku volume ee queries annaga handle iyo keenna la heli karo workforce.

entries.source: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. entries.source: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
